xs.comment: Small containers, link tags, small badges

sm.comment: Buttons, product cards, image containers — the standard Apple button radius

lg.comment: Feature panels, lifestyle image containers. Maximum for rectangular elements.

pill.comment: Full pill CTAs — 'Learn more', 'Shop' links. The signature Apple CTA link shape. 980px mirrors Apple's max-content-width.

circle.comment: Media controls (play/pause arrows), avatar images, circular icon buttons
